message:
wa-ogc.10: comprehensive tutorial tests (state machine + persistence + status)

Add 21 new tests: skip/complete/duplicate exercise handling, track
switching/resuming, achievement unlock/dedup, overall progress,
status rendering, JSON serialization, corrupt progress file,
progress file creation on save, exercise verification fields,
reset clears achievements, and track data integrity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
